hooks.command: file=$(echo "$TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('file_path',''))"); case "$file" in *.py) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format --quiet "$file" && uv run ruff check --fix --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null;; *.sql) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run sqlfluff fix --dialect postgres --quiet "$file" 2>/dev/null;; esac; exit 0
